key.name: max-layers
key.description: Number of focus-history layers. The focused window is layer one and all remaining old windows share the last layer.

key.name: layer-distance
key.description: Visual distance in pixels used to separate older windows from the focused window.

key.name: magnetic-push
key.description: Extra visual push applied to background windows that overlap the focused window.

key.name: use-magnetic-push
key.description: Whether to push overlapping background windows away from the focused window.

key.name: adjust-surrounding-windows-on-focused-move
key.summary: Adjust surrounding windows while moving focused window
key.description: Whether to update nearby background window positions while the focused window is being moved.

key.name: use-cylinder-switcher
key.description: Whether Alt-Tab and Super-Tab replace the default popup with a one-row 3D cylinder window switcher.

key.name: transparency
key.description: Transparency applied by depth. Zero keeps every layer fully opaque, while higher values make deeper layers more transparent.

key.name: rotation-x
key.description: Maximum X-axis spherical rotation in degrees around the focused window.

key.name: rotation-y
key.description: Maximum Y-axis spherical rotation in degrees around the focused window.
